title: Indian courts not bound by emergency arbitrator’s award in interim relief plea: Delhi High Court
description: The Delhi High Court recently reiterated that courts are not bound by orders passed by emergency arbitrators while deciding pleas for interim relief and must independently assess such requests under Indian law. [JLT Energy v. Hindustan Clean Energy]A Bench of Justices Anil Kshetrapal and Amit Mahajan made the observation while dismissing an appeal filed by JLT Energy 9 SAS against refusal of interim protection in its dispute with Hindustan Cleanenergy Limited and others.Justice Anil Kshetarpal a
